Home › Orange County › Winter Park › Pescatarian Restaurants

Pescatarian Restaurants in Winter Park

The cleanest of Winter Park's restaurants with pescatarian options is BULLA GASTROBAR, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 6, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

6 pescatarian restaurants

  • A 100 B
    BULLA GASTROBAR Seafood ★ 4.9 (14925) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +5 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 100 M
    MILLER'S WINTER PARK ALE HOUSE American ★ 4.3 (4431) Winter Park · Orange County KetoPesc. Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 99 B
    BOVINE STEAKHOUSE Seafood ★ 4 (390) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 97 O
    OLIVE GARDEN ITALIAN RESTAURANT #1275 Italian ★ 4.4 (2693) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +2 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 94 R
    REEL FISH COASTAL KITCHEN & BAR American ★ 4.4 (1786) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +5 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • C 75 B
    BOSTON'S FISH HOUSE Seafood ★ 4.5 (2507) Winter Park · Orange County GFDF +5 more Inspected Feb 2026
